description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the dazraf/build-tools:latest Docker image for all jobs, with a global before_script that sets the npm registry ($NPM_REPO), applies npm credentials, creates a local Maven repository, copies Maven settings, clears GPG data, checks GPG version, and imports GPG keys and owner trust from $GPG_KEY, $GPG_PASSPHRASE and $GPG_OWNER_TRUST. Define three stages: build, snapshot_release, and release. In the build stage add a build job that runs only on branches matching /^[0-9]+-.*$/ and executes "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS help:evaluate -Dexpression=settings.localRepository clean license:check install", then "./braid-gradle/gradlew assemble -b ./braid-gradle/build.gradle", and finally uploads coverage with "bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash) -t $CODECOV_TOKEN". In the snapshot_release stage add a deploy job that runs only on the master branch, runs "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS help:evaluate -Dexpression=settings.localRepository license:check install deploy", tags the image with edge and latest tags using docker tag commands, logs into the GitLab registry and Docker Hub, and pushes both ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE} and ${DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME}. In the release stage add a manual release job that runs only on tags matching /^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+.*$/; it sets the version with "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS versions:set -DnewVersion=${BRAID_VERSION:1}", runs two Maven deploy commands for gitlab-release and release,npm-release profiles, tags the images with the git tag or edge and latest, logs into the registries, and pushes the images accordingly, using variables DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME, MAVEN_CLI_OPTS, MAVEN_OPTS and setting BRAID_VERSION to $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME.
